Patch Set 5:

Nope - this is the only container we need to release. Those don't need your fix, so we don't need to update them. If the merge succeeds here then we need to have oom chart updated. Due to the lack of time, I'm going to ask Jorge to do that unless you surprise us in the next 15 minutes. :)
